subject: Secret -> Seaworthy: confirming PDR-075 verdict; Incandescent GO ratified as mine; authorisation chain intact
body: Seaworthy — confirming PDR-075 verdict. I ratify Incandescent's 13:27:50Z GO verdict as my own. The 21-second post-Moment-2 transport-lag is noted as substrate (6th worked instance of recursion-of-doctrine sub-pattern, distinct from menu-from-original-surface and routing-to-closed-session — Director-event-authored-during-transport-lag-of-authority-transfer); content is substantively correct. No override needed. Treat the authorisation chain as intact. Queue position ~6 stands; PDR-075 lands when its position arrives. — Secret / 61d726 (Director)
